rows.definition: appendServeGGUFDevicePlan (cmd/fak/serve.go) extends a compute.MemoryPlan with the GGUF weight-source's device placement for `fak serve`, under the context and fit budgets.
rows.distinction: A serve-time MEMORY-plan extender, not a fleet RunPlan or context-layout Plan.

rows.definition: WeightSource.EstimateExpertParallelLoadMemoryPlan (internal/ggufload/estimate.go) computes the compute.MemoryPlan for loading expert-parallel weights across a rank count.
rows.distinction: A weight-load memory ESTIMATE, not the serve-time device-plan extension that consumes it.

rows.definition: cmdDebugContextPlanPreview (cmd/fak/debug_ctxplan.go) is the `fak debug` CLI entry that renders a ctxplan context-plan preview.
rows.distinction: The CLI wrapper over ctxplan previewing, not the planner or preview engine itself.

rows.definition: cmdPlanAudit (cmd/fak/plan_audit.go) is the `fak plan-audit` CLI entry, exiting with runPlanAudit's status over the plan corpus.
rows.distinction: The plan-AUDIT command, not a plan document or planner.

rows.definition: total_plans (internal/planaudit) is the plan-audit counter of how many plan documents the audit walked.
rows.distinction: An audit COUNT over plan documents, not a plan itself.

rows.definition: context_planning (internal/vcacheobserve/contextjoin.go CausePlanning) is the attribution-cause token tagging cache activity attributed to fak's context planning rather than provider cache behavior.
rows.distinction: An ATTRIBUTION label for observed cache activity, not the planning mechanism.

rows.definition: PlanningAttributed (internal/vcacheobserve/contextjoin.go) counts turns whose cache activity was attributed to context planning.
rows.distinction: The COUNTER for the context_planning attribution cause, not the cause token.

rows.definition: decodeIssueContractCandidates (cmd/fak/issue_contract.go) decodes issue-contract Candidate JSON, accepting an array or wrapped forms.
rows.distinction: A DECODER into issue-contract Candidates, not a candidate type or scorer.

rows.definition: parseCandidates (cmd/fak/dispatch_order.go) parses dispatch-order Candidate JSON for the dispatch ordering pass.
rows.distinction: The dispatch-order candidate DECODER; decodeIssueContractCandidates is its issue-contract sibling.

rows.definition: ReadCandidates (internal/ideascout) reads scouted idea Candidates from a JSON path.
rows.distinction: The ideascout candidate READER; ScoreCandidate grades what it reads.

rows.definition: ScoreCandidate (internal/ideascout) scores a scouted Candidate against a Topic and Config, returning the score and its reasons.
rows.distinction: The ideascout candidate GRADER, not the reader or the candidate type.

rows.definition: fromPlan (cmd/fak/issue_cohort.go) is the --from-plan flag: the issue-plan JSON file a cohort run reads its candidates from.
rows.distinction: A CLI INPUT flag pointing at a plan file, not a plan type.

rows.definition: planPath (cmd/fak/fleet.go) is the --plan flag variable holding the run-plan JSON path in fleet commands.
rows.distinction: A flag variable holding a plan PATH, not the RunPlan document it names.

rows.definition: plannerFor (internal/bench/fanrun.go) picks the agent.Planner for a bench arm - shared or per-agent.
rows.distinction: A bench-side planner SELECTOR, not a planner implementation.

rows.definition: PlanPlacementForDeviceHostAndDisk (internal/engine/capacity_disk.go) plans KV placement across device HBM, host DRAM, and disk for a cachemeta.PlacementRequest.
rows.distinction: A KV PLACEMENT planner across memory tiers, not a context or fleet plan.

rows.definition: resume_plan is the tools/_registry/resume_plan.json artifact: the AUTO_RESUME rows the resume watchdog consumes.
rows.distinction: A fleet-registry ARTIFACT of resume rows; WatchdogPlanRow is one row of it as parsed.

rows.definition: WatchdogPlanRow (internal/resume/watchdog.go) is one AUTO_RESUME entry of resume_plan.json as the watchdog parses it, with ResumeTarget/RehomeSource accessors.
rows.distinction: One PARSED row of the resume_plan artifact, not the whole registry file.

rows.definition: Registry.RotationPlanWithHeadroom (internal/accounts/rotation.go) computes the account-rotation plan honoring per-account rotation headroom.
rows.distinction: An ACCOUNT-rotation plan, not a fleet RunPlan mapping issues to workers.

rows.definition: unwrapHTTPPlanner (internal/gateway/messages.go) unwraps an agent.Planner to its underlying HTTPPlanner when one is present.
rows.distinction: A planner UNWRAPPER for the HTTP layer, not a planner implementation.

rows.definition: cacheKey (internal/witness/cache.go) computes the witness Resolver's memo key for a (kind, arg) verification lookup.
rows.distinction: A memo key inside the WITNESS resolver's cache - not a KV-cache or provider prompt-cache key.

rows.definition: witness cache is the doc-level name for the witness Resolver's memoized verification results (internal/witness/cache.go).
rows.distinction: A memo of verification RESULTS, not a token cache: nothing model-facing is stored.

rows.definition: CompactionCacheReadTokens (internal/gateway/metrics.go) is the OBSERVED provider cache-read token count attributed to compaction turns.
rows.distinction: An OBSERVED provider number attributed to compaction, not a fak-side savings claim.

rows.definition: DefaultCachePricing (internal/gateway/cache_pricing.go) resolves a provider/context pair to its cache read/write pricing multipliers, reporting the source.
rows.distinction: The pricing LOOKUP for cache economics; CacheTTL1h is one tier it prices.

rows.definition: KVEvictionScopeWholePrefixCache (internal/cachemeta/external_invalidation.go) is the KVEvictionScope value meaning the engine flushed the whole prefix cache rather than an exact span.
rows.distinction: One closed SCOPE value of KVEvictionScope, not the scope type itself.

rows.definition: ProviderCacheCreationTokens (internal/metrics, internal/bench) is the prompt-prefix cache WRITE axis: tokens the upstream billed to create cache entries.
rows.distinction: The cache-WRITE billing axis; CachedInputTokens is the read side.

rows.definition: ReasonCachedRemoveWorktreePresent (internal/safecommit/cachedremove.go) is the refusal token CACHED_REMOVE_WORKTREE_PRESENT: a staged deletion while the file still exists in the worktree.
rows.distinction: A safecommit refusal about the git INDEX ('cached' in git's sense), not a model or provider cache.

rows.definition: runCachevalueFeed (cmd/fak/cachevalue.go) is the CLI runner emitting the cache-value savings feed rows.
rows.distinction: The FEED emitter over cache-value accounting, not the accounting itself.

rows.definition: Package vcacheextract (internal/vcacheextract) sanitizes Codex session JSONL token telemetry for vCache accounting.
rows.distinction: The Codex telemetry SANITIZER feeding vCache, not the vCache accounting layer.

rows.definition: vcacheGovernorDecisionOrder (internal/gateway/vcache_families.go) is the fixed render order of governor decisions on the vCache metrics surface.
rows.distinction: A fixed RENDER order for governor decisions, not the governor journal.

rows.definition: vcacheWindowHasCacheActivity (internal/gateway/vcache_families.go) is the predicate: does an observed turn window contain any cache read/write activity at all.
rows.distinction: A window-level activity PREDICATE, not a savings number.

rows.definition: compute_gated_score is the reference SWE-bench scoring rule (correctness-gated speedup) that internal/frontierswe/score.go's GatedScore ports to Go.
rows.distinction: A correctness-GATED scoring formula, not an admission or commit gate.

rows.definition: finishGuardChildAndReport (cmd/fak/guard_child.go) folds a guarded child's exit state, gateway shutdown, and audit summary into the final guard report.
rows.distinction: The guarded-child TEARDOWN/report step, not a gate decision.

rows.definition: guard_child.go (cmd/fak) resolves the guarded child's upstream wire/credential posture and runs the child process under the guard.
rows.distinction: The child-RUNNING half of fak guard, not the guard front-door command itself.

rows.definition: formatGuardRefusalCarryForward (cmd/fak/guard_carryforward.go) formats the carried-forward guard refusals for the startup banner.
rows.distinction: The banner FORMATTER over carried refusals; guardRefusalCarry is one carried record.

rows.definition: guardRefusalCarry (cmd/fak/guard.go) is one carried-forward refusal record surfaced in the guard banner at next start.
rows.distinction: One carried refusal RECORD, not the formatter that renders the set.

rows.definition: gateable is the recurring doc adjective for a number CI can gate on - measured, first-class, and exiting non-zero on regression (hooklat, releasestale).
rows.distinction: An ADJECTIVE about numbers fit for gating, not a gate mechanism.

rows.definition: GateLatencyRegression (internal/turntaxmeter/hooklat.go) is the closed token GATE_LATENCY_REGRESSION for a hook-latency regression verdict.
rows.distinction: A latency-regression VERDICT token, not the hook gate that emits it.

rows.definition: guardFdIsTerminal (cmd/fak/guard.go) reports whether a guard file descriptor is a terminal, selecting banner formatting.
rows.distinction: A tty PROBE for banner output, not a guard decision.

rows.definition: guardFindReasonRoot (cmd/fak/guard_carryforward.go) locates the root directory holding guard refusal-reason artifacts.
rows.distinction: A PATH resolver for refusal artifacts, not a refusal reason.

rows.definition: guardInfoVars (cmd/fak/info.go) is the /debug/vars snapshot `fak info` fetches from a live guard gateway.
rows.distinction: A fetched DEBUG snapshot for the info panel, not guard state itself.

rows.definition: guard_precompact.go (cmd/fak) installs the PreCompact hook wiring when fak guard wraps a Claude command.
rows.distinction: The PreCompact hook INSTALLER, one of the guard's per-harness install shapes (beside the Codex and MCP installs).

rows.definition: guardPreCompactIsClaudeCommand (cmd/fak/guard_precompact.go) detects whether the guarded command is a Claude CLI invocation, so the PreCompact hook install applies.
rows.distinction: The Claude-detection twin of guardIsCodex, scoped to the PreCompact install.

rows.definition: guardProfileHasRepoint (cmd/fak/guard_repoint.go) checks the harness profile for a repoint mechanism applicable to the guarded command.
rows.distinction: A capability PROBE on the harness profile, not the repoint action.

rows.definition: guardReadableAuditPath (cmd/fak/guard.go) returns the audit-log path fak guard prints, when it is readable.
rows.distinction: An audit-path RESOLVER for the banner, not the audit log itself.

rows.definition: printGuardCodexNote (cmd/fak/guard_codex.go) prints the Codex install note in the guard banner.
rows.distinction: The Codex-note PRINTER; printGuardMCPNote is its MCP sibling.

rows.definition: printGuardMCPNote (cmd/fak/guard_mcp.go) prints the MCP self-query install note in the guard banner.
rows.distinction: The MCP-note PRINTER; printGuardCodexNote is its Codex sibling.

rows.definition: resolveGuardUpstream (cmd/fak/guard_child.go) resolves the guarded child's upstream: provider, base URL, and credential posture (API key vs OAuth).
rows.distinction: The upstream RESOLUTION step inside guard startup, not a gate verdict.

rows.definition: writeGuardInfoFrame (cmd/fak/info_visual.go) writes one refreshed frame of the guard info panel.
rows.distinction: A panel RENDER step for fak info, not guard state.

rows.definition: ClassifyContextHealth (internal/scorecardpane/contexthealth.go) folds ContextHealthSignals into a ContextHealthSeverity.
rows.distinction: The severity FOLD; ContextHealthSeverity is the closed output type.

rows.definition: context health (internal/scorecardpane/contexthealth.go, issue #1579) is the user-facing severity fold over managed-context signals - one word for how well the managed context program is doing.
rows.distinction: A user-facing HEALTH readout over managed context, not the context-MMU mechanism.

rows.definition: ContextHealthSeverity (internal/scorecardpane/contexthealth.go) is the closed severity type context health folds to, with a validity check.
rows.distinction: The closed severity TYPE, not the classifier that produces it.

rows.definition: ContextHealthSignalsFromSLORows (internal/scorecardpane/contexthealth.go) builds ContextHealthSignals from managed-context SLO rows.
rows.distinction: The signals BUILDER from SLO rows; ClassifyContextHealth grades what it builds.

rows.definition: CompactionAnchorStarved (internal/gateway/metrics.go) counts under-budget compaction bails whose protected prefix already exceeded the budget - nothing sheddable remained.
rows.distinction: One specific BAIL reason counter; CompactionBailed is the total bail count.

rows.definition: CompactionBailed (internal/gateway/metrics.go) counts compaction attempts that bailed, with a witnessed per-reason breakdown.
rows.distinction: The total bail COUNTER; CompactionAnchorStarved is one reason within it.

rows.definition: CompactionDroppedTurns (internal/gateway/metrics.go) counts conversation turns dropped by gateway compaction.
rows.distinction: A dropped-TURN counter, not a token count like CompactionCacheReadTokens.

rows.definition: CompactionOff (internal/gateway/metrics.go) counts compaction attempts recorded with the off outcome - turns where compaction was disabled.
rows.distinction: The disabled-outcome COUNTER, one cell of the compaction attempt breakdown.

rows.definition: compaction_shed (internal/cachevaluereport/track2.go) is the cache-value mechanism label for savings created by fak's compaction shedding turns (owner=fak).
rows.distinction: An ATTRIBUTION label in the savings report, not a metrics counter.

rows.definition: Budget.contextBounded (internal/session/session.go) reports whether the session budget still has context tokens left.
rows.distinction: A budget PREDICATE about remaining context, not a cap-applying transform like withContextCap.

rows.definition: Budget.withContextCap (internal/session/session.go) clamps a session budget to its context cap.
rows.distinction: The cap-APPLYING transform; contextBounded only tests the remainder.

rows.definition: Table.ContextNudge (internal/session/ctxspike.go) returns the context-spike nudge string the turn loop splices into a run when a spike is detected.
rows.distinction: A spike-triggered NUDGE message, not a compaction or budget mechanism.

rows.definition: ContextQueryAuditRecord (internal/gateway/context_query_audit.go) is one audit record of a missing-context MCP query and the clarification plan it produced.
rows.distinction: An AUDIT record of context queries, not the missing_context reason token.

rows.definition: ctxvalue (internal/gateway/ctxvalue.go, schema fak-ctxvalue-report/1) is the gateway's context-value report surface.
rows.distinction: A VALUE report over context, not the context-MMU or planner.

rows.definition: ISSUE_AGENT_CONTEXT_INCOMPLETE (internal/issuecontract ReasonAgentIncomplete) is the closed refusal token for an issue whose agent-context section is incomplete.
rows.distinction: An issue-CONTRACT refusal token, not a session-context condition.

rows.definition: managed context is fak's gateway-owned context program - the SLO-reported alternative to client-managed context (internal/productscorecard ManagedContextSLOReport).
rows.distinction: The PROGRAM of gateway-owned context; context health is its user-facing severity readout.

rows.definition: ManagedContextSLOReport (internal/productscorecard) folds managed-context SLO rows into the product-scorecard report map.
rows.distinction: The SLO report FOLD for managed context, not the program itself.

rows.definition: SessionShape.MaxContextTokens (internal/turnbench/longcontext.go) is a bench session shape's context-window token cap.
rows.distinction: A BENCH shape parameter, not the live session budget's context cap.

rows.definition: missing_context (internal/selfquery/clarification.go ClarificationMissingContext) is the closed clarification reason: the agent lacks context it needs.
rows.distinction: A clarification REASON token; MissingContextClarifications builds the question plan for it.

rows.definition: MissingContextClarifications (internal/selfquery/clarification.go) builds the ClarificationPlan for a set of missing context keys.
rows.distinction: The plan BUILDER for the missing_context reason, not the reason token.

rows.definition: runCtx (internal/bgloop, internal/fleetpane) is the derived cancellable context.Context a background run executes under - Go cancellation plumbing.
rows.distinction: A Go context.Context VARIABLE, not fak's managed context or context-MMU.

rows.definition: STALE_RECALL (internal/recall/rehydrate.go) is the closed withhold token for a recalled fact whose concrete artifacts no longer verify on a Cold+ wake.
rows.distinction: The WITHHOLD token the recall gate emits; recall is the mechanism it protects.

rows.definition: dos_witness_verbs.go (internal/hooks) is fak's bounded mirror of the DOS commit-audit claim classifier's code-effect verb set.
rows.distinction: A VERB vocabulary mirror for commit-claim grading, not a witness mechanism.

rows.definition: EvidenceTrustEpoch (internal/recall) is the recall trust axis: the integrity epoch a page was admitted under must still be current.
rows.distinction: The EPOCH axis of recall evidence; EvidenceWitness is the external-witness axis.

rows.definition: EvidenceWitness (internal/recall) is the recall trust axis: the external trust witness a page was admitted under must still verify.
rows.distinction: The WITNESS axis of recall evidence; EvidenceTrustEpoch is the integrity-clock axis.

rows.definition: origin_witness (internal/taskmgr, /fak/tasks filter) is the evidence axis naming WHICH witness vouched for a task's origin claim.
rows.distinction: Names the vouching witness on a task record; PathWitness/ShapeWitness are witness kinds it may name.

rows.definition: ReasonReviewRefuted (internal/safecommit) is the refusal token REVIEW_REFUTED: an opt-in scout review refuted the diff before commit.
rows.distinction: A commit REFUSAL token from review evidence, not a witness kind.

rows.definition: Package unwitnessedclaim (internal/unwitnessedclaim) buckets issue-close claims that carry no witness, for `fak unwitnessed-claim`.
rows.distinction: The BUCKETER of witness-less claims, not a claim or witness type.

rows.definition: witnessed_numbers (`fak dispatch progress --json`) is the JSON key listing issue numbers whose close was witnessed by commit links.
rows.distinction: A WITNESSED-set key in dispatch progress, not a witness mechanism.

rows.definition: witnessJSON (cmd/fak/dispatch_commit_links.go) is the --witness-json flag: a path of commit-linked issue witness facts to bucket close-gate failures from.
rows.distinction: A CLI INPUT of witness facts, not a witness kind.

rows.definition: witness_test.go is the doc-referenced test-file name anchoring witness-behavior claims in docs/claims - a pointer to where witness behavior is proven.
rows.distinction: A DOC pointer to the proving test file, not a production witness symbol.

rows.definition: WitnessWindow (internal/cachewitness/cachewitness.go) is the bounded record window a cache-usage witness folds over.
rows.distinction: The fold WINDOW for cache-witness records; CacheBit is the one-bit verdict from it.

rows.definition: fleet_session_signals is the auth-block taxonomy shared by runtime status readers - tools/fleet_session_signals.py, ported as internal/resume/signals.
rows.distinction: The fleet-level signal TAXONOMY; package sessionsignals is its per-session Go classifier core.

rows.definition: registerServeSessionDurability (cmd/fak/session_durable.go) registers a serve session with the durability re-publisher so its descriptor stays published.
rows.distinction: The REGISTRATION entry into sessionDurability, not the re-publisher itself.

rows.definition: runSessionResetDiff (cmd/fak/session_reset_diff.go) is the `fak session reset-diff` runner: diffs a session envelope across a reset.
rows.distinction: A reset DIFF tool over session envelopes, not session state.

rows.definition: SessionAssumption (internal/gateway/gateway.go) is one assumed-context fact the gateway exposes per session via /debug assumptions.
rows.distinction: An exposed ASSUMPTION record, not a session descriptor or budget.

rows.definition: session_spend.go (cmd/fak) is the host spend meter: prices a session's turns from billed usage; unpriced pairs stay dollar-blind (no debit).
rows.distinction: The DOLLAR meter over a session, not its token or time budget.

rows.definition: SessionTime (internal/gateway/gateway.go) is the per-session clock snapshot exposed in gateway session state, with an IsZero test.
rows.distinction: A CLOCK snapshot on session state, not the session lease or budget.

rows.definition: stopped_sessions is the stopped-session classify/decide core: internal/resume/stopped, the Go port of tools/stopped_sessions.py.
rows.distinction: The classifier of STOPPED sessions for resume, not live session state.

rows.definition: DefaultGatewayBaseURL (internal/frontierswe/env_adapter.go) is the default OpenAI-compatible fak gateway base URL (http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1) the SWE-bench env adapter wires the shim to.
rows.distinction: The DEFAULT constant; GatewayBaseURL is the config field it backs.

rows.definition: GatewayBaseURL (frontierswe EnvAdapterConfig; cmd/fak swebench_fleet gatewayBaseURL) carries the fak gateway base URL a run should point its client at.
rows.distinction: The CONFIGURED gateway address, not the gateway server itself.

rows.definition: gatewayBase (internal/frontierswe/env_adapter.go) is the resolved gateway base URL variable threaded through env-adapter boundary validation and job YAML.
rows.distinction: The RESOLVED local variable; GatewayBaseURL is the config field it comes from.

rows.definition: engineeringWorkKinds (internal/fleetaccounts/route.go) is the set of work kinds routed to engineering seats.
rows.distinction: A fleet ROUTING set named 'engineering', unrelated to the inference engine.

rows.definition: Package gatewayusageledger (internal/gatewayusageledger) persists per-turn gateway usage rows that the audit-usage fold reads.
rows.distinction: The USAGE ledger behind the gateway, not the gateway server.

rows.definition: matchKernelGlob (internal/hooks/gate_priorart.go, cmd/fak/sota.go) matches a path against a kernel-surface glob for the prior-art gate and `fak sota`.
rows.distinction: A GLOB matcher over kernel-surface paths, not the kernel itself.

rows.definition: modkernel32 (internal/dispatchaudit, internal/harnessres) is the lazily loaded kernel32.dll handle Windows sampling code calls procs through.
rows.distinction: A WINDOWS DLL binding (kernel32.dll), not fak's kernel concept.

rows.definition: VLLMEngine (internal/engine/vllm.go) is the vLLM-backed engine adapter, declaring its capability set.
rows.distinction: One concrete engine ADAPTER; engine is the general abstraction.

rows.definition: VLLMEngineID (internal/engine/vllm.go) is the closed engine id 'vllm' naming the vLLM adapter.
rows.distinction: The ID constant for VLLMEngine, not the adapter.

rows.definition: materializeFusedExpertTensor (internal/model/materialize.go) materializes a fused MoE expert tensor from per-expert entries in the safetensors manifest.
rows.distinction: TENSOR materialization for MoE weights, not context/prompt rendering.

rows.definition: renderable is the doc adjective for context that can be rendered into prompt text - ctxplan prices a span by tokenizing its renderable text.
rows.distinction: An ADJECTIVE about render-capable context, not a render function.

rows.definition: RenderContextStatusLine (internal/scorecardpane/contextstatus.go) renders the one-line context status shown by fak info.
rows.distinction: A STATUS-line renderer, not the context program it summarizes.

rows.definition: renderCoreLockWarnings (cmd/fak/corelockwarn.go) renders core-lock warnings for commit preview and hygiene output.
rows.distinction: A WARNING renderer for core-lock findings, not the safecommit lock check.

rows.definition: RenderDigest (internal/memoryread) renders the agent-memory digest `fak memory-read` prints, bounded by max bytes.
rows.distinction: The MEMORY digest renderer, not a context or plan renderer.

rows.definition: renderFiles (internal/uiquality) is the fixed list of render-surface files the uiquality scorecard audits.
rows.distinction: An AUDIT file list about render surfaces, not a renderer.

rows.definition: RenderKnownUnknownAssumedContext (internal/contextq/context_render.go) renders the known/unknown/assumed context split for debug output.
rows.distinction: A DEBUG renderer of the context split, not the context query result.

rows.definition: RenderLine (internal/fleettrend) renders the one-line fleet trend readout from trend rows.
rows.distinction: A one-line TREND renderer, not a context renderer.

rows.definition: renderOrder (internal/workflowaudit) is the fixed order ref classes are rendered in by the workflow audit.
rows.distinction: An ORDERING constant for audit rendering, not a renderer.

rows.definition: RenderRawFakContractMarkdown (internal/frontierswe/smoke_contract.go) renders the raw fak smoke contract as markdown.
rows.distinction: A CONTRACT markdown renderer, not a context renderer.

rows.definition: RenderRecovery (internal/guardrsi/recovery.go) renders a guardrsi RecoveryReport for the CLI.
rows.distinction: A RECOVERY-report renderer, not the recovery logic.

rows.definition: AreaPolicy (internal/ctxplan/layout.go) is the per-area layout policy of a context plan, with defaults applied by areaWithDefault.
rows.distinction: A ctxplan LAYOUT policy per area, not the loaded fleet Policy.

rows.definition: DefaultAssumptionPolicy (internal/ctxplan/assumption.go) returns the default AssumptionPolicy governing what a plan may assume.
rows.distinction: The DEFAULT for assumption policy, not a loaded policy file.

rows.definition: defaultLoopPolicy (cmd/fak/loop.go) returns the default policy name a `fak loop` run uses when none is given.
rows.distinction: The loop-run policy DEFAULT, not the policy manifest.

rows.definition: defaultResumeSourcePolicy (cmd/fak/resume.go) returns the default resume source-policy selection when none is configured.
rows.distinction: The resume-source policy DEFAULT; LoadSourcePolicy reads the configured one.

rows.definition: LoadPolicy (internal/fleetaccounts/paths.go) loads the fleet-accounts Policy from its Paths.
rows.distinction: The fleet-accounts policy LOADER; LoadSourcePolicy is the resume-side loader.

rows.definition: LoadSourcePolicy (internal/resume/source_governor.go) loads resume SourcePolicies from a path.
rows.distinction: The resume-source policy LOADER; LoadPolicy is the fleet-accounts loader.

rows.definition: preflights (internal/qwen36nodereports; dispatch docs) are the pre-dispatch check reports a run loads or performs before committing to work.
rows.distinction: PRE-run checks, not a policy document or capability floor.

rows.definition: WalkPolicy (internal/gardenbundle/walk.go) is the policy governing which items a garden walk admits.
rows.distinction: The garden-walk ADMISSION policy; WalkPlan is the folded result.

rows.definition: climb_ratchet_debt (internal/milestonereport/ratchet.go RatchetDebtKey) is the milestone ratchet's debt key on the control pane.
rows.distinction: The RATCHET debt key, one debt-keyed number among the scorecard debts.

rows.definition: tools/demo_robustness_scorecard.py is the demo-robustness scorecard registered on the control pane under robustness_debt.
rows.distinction: The demo-ROBUSTNESS scorecard, a sibling of the readiness scorecards.

rows.definition: emitScorecard (cmd/fak) is the shared helper rendering a scorecard payload - human, JSON, markdown, or compare - under a debt key.
rows.distinction: The shared EMITTER for scorecard verbs, not a scorecard.

rows.definition: scorecardCmdSetup (cmd/fak/skill_effectiveness.go) is the shared argument/setup scaffold (flags, compare, markdown) scorecard verbs run through.
rows.distinction: The shared SETUP scaffold; emitScorecard is the shared output half.

rows.definition: token_defaults_debt is the debt key of the token-defaults scorecard on the control pane (cmd/fak token-defaults-scorecard).
rows.distinction: The token-DEFAULTS debt key, one control-pane debt number.

rows.definition: tools/tooling_quality_scorecard.py is the Python-tooling quality scorecard on the control pane (py_debt) - the meter for Python not yet ported to the Go-first hygiene path.
rows.distinction: The PYTHON-tooling quality meter, a sibling of the other control-pane scorecards.

rows.definition: ui_quality_debt (internal/uiquality DebtKey) is the debt key of the uiquality scorecard over fak's render surfaces.
rows.distinction: The UI-quality debt key, one control-pane debt number.

rows.definition: CoveragePct (internal/commitsubject/coverage.go) is the coverage-percentage field of the commit-subject coverage payload.
rows.distinction: A PERCENT readout of coverage; minCoverage is the floor it is graded against.

rows.definition: minCoverage (internal/commitsubject, internal/toolcoverage) is the optional minimum-coverage floor the coverage payload builders grade against.
rows.distinction: The coverage FLOOR parameter, not the measured percentage.

rows.definition: Package qwen36parity (internal/qwen36parity) loads and grades qwen3.6 parity witness reports against a required ratio.
rows.distinction: A model-PARITY grader, not a test-coverage meter.

rows.definition: RouterCoverage (internal/dispatchtick/router.go) reports how much of the issue backlog the dispatch router actually fetched against its limit.
rows.distinction: DISPATCH-router backlog coverage, not code or tool coverage.

rows.definition: Package sotacoverage (internal/sotacoverage) drives the sota-coverage scorecard (sota_debt) over the prior-art matrix.
rows.distinction: PRIOR-ART matrix coverage, not code coverage.

rows.definition: Package toolcoverage (internal/toolcoverage) audits which load-bearing tools modules have sibling tests.
rows.distinction: TOOLS-test coverage, not dispatch or prior-art coverage.

rows.definition: CanEvict (internal/model/kvcache.go, internal/kvmmu) reports whether the KV cache is in a state where eviction may proceed.
rows.distinction: The eviction PRECONDITION check, not the eviction action.

rows.definition: KVEvictionScope (internal/cachemeta/external_invalidation.go) is the closed scope type of an external KV eviction - exact span versus whole prefix cache.
rows.distinction: The SCOPE type of an eviction attestation, not the eviction check or action.

rows.definition: k_flash_attention (internal/compute/cuda.go) is the CUDA flash-attention decode kernel - tiled over the KV window with a running max/sum so no full score buffer materializes.
rows.distinction: The CUDA decode KERNEL for attention, not an attention observer or metric.

rows.definition: Config.linearAttnDims (internal/model/qwen35.go) returns the linear-attention head/dim geometry for hybrid models.
rows.distinction: GEOMETRY for linear attention layers, not the attention kernel.

rows.definition: PreviewLayout (internal/ctxplan/preview.go) renders a Preview of spans under a Layout, forecast, budget, and cost model.
rows.distinction: The PREVIEW over a ctxplan Layout; ProbeLayout probes the per-area spans.

rows.definition: Index.ProbeLayout (internal/ctxplan/layout.go) probes the per-area spans a Layout would produce for a forecast.
rows.distinction: The span PROBE for a layout; PreviewLayout renders the full preview.
